titleStmt.title: SII 9.415: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao

No. 415. (A.R. No. 375 of 1927.) ON A SLAB SET UP BY THE SIDE OF THE EAST VERANDAH OF THE OUTER PRAKARA OF THE KOTESVARA TEMPLE AT KOTESVARA, A SUBURB OF COONDAPUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1295, Parīdhāvin, Kārtika, śu. 5, Gu[ruvāra]. In Parīdhāvin Kārttika, śu. 5 corresponded to A.D. 1372 November 1 Monday. But in the next year, i.e., Pramādin the tithi did fall on a Thursday = A.D. 1373 October 20; f.d.t. ·55. The inscription refers itself to the reign of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vīra-Bukkaṇṇa-Voḍeya. It records that when the Mahāpradhāna Gōparasa-Voḍeya was ruling the Bārukūra-rājya, Nandinātha, Bhṛiṅginātha, Vīrabhadradēva and Gaṇakumāra-Heggaḍe, purchased some plots of land, of specified boundary, in Kōṭēśvara and made a gift of it to the temple of Kōṭēśvara for feeding Ubhaya-Jaṅgamas during the festival called kaṭiya-habba; the yield of the land was 12 mūḍes of rice and 40 honnus.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . jayābhyudayaśakavaruṣa 1295
neya paridhāvisaṁvatsarada kārttika śu 5
gu dalu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Ārirāyavi
bhāḍa bhāṣege tappuva rāyara gaṁḍa śrīvīrabukkaṁṇa
voḍeyara rājyābhyudayalu śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ gō
parasavoḍeyaru bārakkūra rājyavanāḷuva kāladalu śrīmatu
naṁdinātha bhruṁginātha vīrabhadradēvaru mukhyarāda bāra
kkūra tāyisthaḷada mahaṁtu gaṇakumārahegaḍe Aṁtu
yivarugaḷu Ēkastharāgi śrīmatu kōṭīśvaradēvara saṁnidhi
yalu kaṭiyahabbadalu Ubhaya jaṁgamarige Ārōgaṇa
ya dharmake koṁḍa bāḷu koṭa bāḷatiya bageyalu dani
yaru mūlavāgi koṁḍa bāḷu mane maneya ṭhāu bāvi
bāgila gadde Alli paḍuva makke yellaū kaṁnuvakaṭṭeya
baḍagaṇau Eraḍu gadde maṁjaṇana gaddeya mūḍaguḷiya
na gadde bidiraḍiya gadde Aṁttu nāgaṁḍugadalu bitta
bittuva hattu mūḍe gaddege bārakūra parivartta
nake saluva gadyāṇa nūṟu hoṁnaṁ daniyara
kaiyalu koṭṭaru Ā bāḷina mēle baha gēṇi
yakki nāgaṁḍugadalu Eṁbatu mūḍe hu

ccaya bāḷu toṟeyana bāḷinalu baha
bhattada bageyakki mūṟu mūḍe Aṁtu
ha(ṁ)nneraḍu mūḍe Akkiyanū varuṣapra
tiyū divākaradaniyaru naḍasi �yo
dhar(ṁ)mmavanū pālisi baharu bara
da sēnabōva paramēśvaranu śrīkō
ṭinātha śaraṇu �yo Akkiya koṟatege ko
ṭhṭhāriguḍiya nālvattu hāne gaddeya mēlaṇa E
ṁṭu hāneyakkiyū kūḍi naḍaudu śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.415 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
